text:
(1/5)
🚀 Excited to share our CVPR paper MATCH!
Website: https://t.co/pVkFpdk9Og
Given calibrated multi-view images, MATCH infers static Gaussian splat textures in correspondence across subjects and expressions. This speeds up avatar optimization by a factor of 10x.🧵👇 https://t.co/1yoBrBRNA9

text:
Early prototype for Gaussian Splats relighting.

It's a baseline implementation that lets you harmonize lighting between the 3D scene and Gaussian Splat-based objects. More sophisticated relighting techniques, including self-shadowing and multiple light sources, are still a work https://t.co/h752XzNbrx
